set F_UNIQ := 6 9 12 15;
set F_NODES[6] := 6 7 8;
set F_NODES[9] := 9 10 11;
set F_NODES[12] := 12 13 14;
set F_NODES[15] := 15 16 17;
#definition

# set
set V := 1 2 3 4 5 ; 	# customer set
set F := 6 9 12 15 7 8 10 11 13 14 16 17 ;#recharging & battery swapping station
set D0 :=0;
set Dsig :=18;


# param
param CV := 200;    		# ECV fixed cost(Topic Given)
param C := 1000;   		# ECV max load
param Q := 77.75; 		# ECV/BSV battery level
param h := 1;     		# ECV consumption

param CB := 267;    		# BSV fixed cost(Topic Given)
param Qplun := 5;       # BSV max load(battery)
param hplun := 1;     	# BSV consumption
param W := 155.50;		# BSV battery level

param Ct := 10;    		# travel cost
param Cr := 100;    		# recharging cost
param lamda := 0.00;	# battery swap time
param Cb ;  	    # battery swap cost(BSS/BSV)
param n :=5;	   		# number of customers
param g :=1.17 ;     	# the recharging rate of ECV
